subject: Watching
body:
Chomsky's requiem for the American Dream. Fascinating. Brilliant guy.

Separately, trump is not a force for a civil society. EVERY taxi/Uber driver I've encountered is FOR him. I really don't get it.

How are you?

Xo

Co-authored with iPhone auto-correct
